questions.question: What can you earn by completing Notion Academy learning paths?

options.explanation: Badges are earned, not cash.
The article states you earn badges for completing paths.
Subscriptions are not mentioned as a reward.
Certificates are digital, not physical.

questions.question: Which of the following statements about becoming a Notion Certified Admin is correct?

options.text: It is only available for Enterprise plan users
options.explanation: The article says it’s available for any plan type.

options.text: It requires you to build a custom workspace from scratch
options.explanation: Certification focuses on running Notion at scale, not building from scratch.

options.text: You can become certified on any plan type at any company
options.explanation: The article explicitly mentions this.

options.text: Certification is granted automatically after completing a single lesson
options.explanation: Certification involves a formal process, not a single lesson.

questions.question: How many lessons are included in the "Essentials Path"?

options.explanation: The article lists 3 lessons for this path.
The "Essentials Path" description states it contains 3 lessons.
Four lessons belong to the Workflows Path, not Essentials.
Five lessons are part of the Advanced Path.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Custom Agents in Notion?

options.explanation: Custom Agents automate work, not design UI.

options.text: To automate repeat work and reduce everyday busywork
options.explanation: The article describes Custom Agents as tools to automate repeat work.

options.text: To create public templates for the marketplace
options.explanation: Template creation is a separate lesson.
Webinars are a separate offering.

questions.question: Which lesson is categorized as "Intermediate" and focuses on "Project management"?

options.explanation: Custom Agents is a Beginner lesson.
The article lists a Project management lesson marked Intermediate.
Workspace design is Advanced.
Sharing & collaboration is Beginner.

questions.question: How long does the "Templates & marketplace" lesson take to complete?

options.explanation: 20 minutes is the duration for Building basics.
30 minutes is the duration for Custom Agents.
The article lists the Templates & marketplace lesson as 40 minutes.
15 minutes matches Sharing & collaboration.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a way to engage with Notion Academy beyond lessons?

options.explanation: Live webinars are offered.
Community involvement is mentioned.
The article does not mention downloading the mobile app as an Academy engagement method.
The Help Center is listed as a resource.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of the "Workflows Path"?

options.text: Learning how to design UI mockups in Notion
options.explanation: UI mockups are not the focus of the Workflows Path.

options.text: Creating connected systems that unite teams and projects, with AI assistance
options.explanation: The description states the Workflows Path helps build connected systems with AI.

options.text: Earning a certification in Notion security best practices
options.explanation: Security certification is separate from the Workflows Path.

options.text: Developing public Notion templates for sale
options.explanation: Template creation is covered in a different lesson.

questions.question: Which lesson is specifically designed for beginners and teaches the basics of navigating Notion and using blocks?

options.explanation: Building basics is a beginner lesson covering navigation, blocks, databases, and wikis.

options.text: An issue tracker for any team
options.explanation: That lesson is Intermediate.
Workspace design is Advanced.
Custom Agents focuses on automation, not basic navigation.

questions.question: According to the article, which of the following statements best describes the relationship between Notion Academy paths and badges?

options.text: Badges are only awarded after completing the Advanced Path
options.explanation: Badges can be earned by completing any path, not just the Advanced one.

options.text: Each path is curated to help you level up and earn badges at your own pace
options.explanation: The article explicitly says paths help you level up and earn badges at your own pace.

options.text: Badges are automatically granted when you register for a live webinar
options.explanation: Webinar attendance does not directly grant badges.

options.text: Only certified admins can earn badges
options.explanation: Anyone completing paths can earn badges; certification is separate.
